title: Broken/Unused Items
description: adds different broken objects that are in the game but now actually obtanable through commands/creative tab. everything is in the operator items tab in creative
body:
# **Adds different items that were deleted, unused or just unobtainable and broken.** 
**Everything thats in the mod is accessible in the operator items tab in creative.** _(options > controls > Operator Items Tab: ON)_
# list of items:
- Invisible Bedrock
- Glowing Obsidian
- tile.glowingobsidian.name
- Nether Reactor Core (OLD) (not functional)
- Nether Reactor Core (NEW) (not functional)
- Initialized Nether Reactor Core (not functional)
- Finished Nether Reactor Core (not functional)
- tile.info_update.name
- tile.info2_update.name
- tile.reserved6.name
- Unknown
- Debug
- Debug2
- Allow

- Allow
- Deny
- Endstone Prototype
- Honey Prototype

- Wax Block
- UnknownGrassA

- Dupe Hack (block)
- USB Charger Block 
- Air
- Debug Fourj Item
- Six Sided Hay Bale
- Bubble Column (JE)
- tile.air.name
- Fire

- Build Allow Block
- Build Dissalow Block
